---
title: "About this website"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

# This is Jeff's awesome website

This site is made from RMD

![](https://media.giphy.com/media/drXGoW1iudhKw/giphy.gif)

![](image/tom.jpg)


Heres a direct link to the about page: [about](about.html)

I also made a bonus [extra page](extrapage.html)
